target: 7. Scouring the Island

Finally made it to Mt. Takanosu!
That memo's location,
It's definitely here!

You always say the same thing
When you go somewhere else.

When we went to Alain's field,
When we went to Tiger Island,
Even when we went to Shinja Marsh.

I'm totally exhausted from walking
All over the island…
Hey, Kaori.

Hehe…
We really walked all over the place.

So this time, it's the real deal!
Look at this memo!

I just remembered.
This cat drawing was of a black cat
That used to live on Mt. Takanosu.

You know, back when
We did outdoor classes, right?
Do you remember?

Oh…!
I remember!

It was a cat sunbathing on the rocks,
Right after I finished reading a book about cats.
I remember that clearly.

That's right!
Then I tried to pet it,
But I slipped on the slope and fell.

…I remember.
I went to help you then.
We both got in trouble.

Sister,
You always cause Shinpei trouble.

It was Shinpei who yelled "Ushio!" so loud
That the teacher found out.
You…

Forget that!
Look at this stone in the memo!
This isn't just a pebble, is it?
It's the stone Shinpei threw!
Huh, I did?

Yeah, by those trees.
There was a squirrel there.

A snake was approaching it,
And Shinpei noticed.
He threw a stone and scared it away.
Heh, that's like Shinpei.
Hmm… I don't remember that…

So the drawing of the tree in the memo
Means those standing trees?

Now that you mention it…
It kind of looks like it.

That's some great deduction!
This memo was a map of Mt. Takanosu!

You wrote the memo in the first place,
So why do you need to deduce it?

If you had remembered earlier,
We wouldn't have needed to go to Tiger Island…
That's why there's joy in being right.

You might be right,
But if this place doesn't work out,
I was planning to go somewhere else.
Well, I won't deny that.
You really don't think things through, sister.
That's called being spontaneous!
Hah… I'm the one getting dragged into this.
…Hehe!
Hehehe, hahaha!
Uh… Koyuba?

Hehe, sorry!
It's so funny, I couldn't help it!
All three of you look so happy.

I'm always like this, you know.
Hey, Shinpei.
Yeah, I guess.
(At least… it's good that Koyuba is enjoying herself)

(At first she seemed a bit stiff,
But now her expression looks more relaxed)

(If I think about it…
Going back and forth across the island
Might not have been a waste after all)

Anyway, there's definitely treasure
Right in the middle of these three points!

Now we just need to find the time capsule's location
And dig it up!
Shinpei, bring out the shovel!
Yes, yes.
…Oh!
What's wrong?

U-uh, nothing…
Let's go look for the time capsule too.
Yeah.

Come on, we're almost there!
The top of the hill is right there.

Everyone, watch your step!
This area is sloped, it's slippery!
Yikes!
You should be the one watching out!

That was a bad example!
Then I'll go ahead!

Ah, I feel like I'm really
Going on an adventure.
I used to play like this back then.

Yeah, we did.
Sou joined in too, we used to
Play around at the old cannon site and that area.
Huh… So you guys used to play like that?
Mio, come here for a second!
What is it, sister?!

That girl, she's always like this.
Saying she's making a secret base,
And dragging us all around.
Heh, I can imagine it.

If only I had been as proactive
Back then as I am now,
I could have been with you guys…
…Yikes!
Dangerous!!
Ah…!

Phew, that was close.
Are you okay?
Y-yes… thank you.

You need to be careful here.
It's muddy.

You just told me that…
I'm sorry.

You don't need to apologize.
It's muddy here.

Anyway, are you hurt?
If you got hurt, that would be serious.

I'm fine.
Thanks to Shinpei catching me.
Oh, that's good.
Ah, um…
Huh? What's wrong?
Um, thank you.
You don't need to thank me.
I was happy, and…
That's how it was back then too.
Huh…?

No, it's nothing!
Anyway…
Huh?
I'm okay now, so you can let go…

Ah, right! Sorry!
Can you stand on your own?
U-um, I think so… yikes!
Hahaha, you're slipping again.
I'm sorry.
Then, take my arm.
Ah, thanks…
Hold on until we get to a flat area.
Ah, thank you…

Shinpei! What are you doing?
Hurry over here!
She's calling. Let's go.
U-um.
Ah… we didn't find the time capsule after all.
I thought it was definitely there…

Give up already…
If we dig more, we'll be too sore to move tomorrow.

Sorry, Kaori.
We couldn't find the time capsule.

Plus… with the concert coming up,
You made us too tired.

No, I'm not bothered at all!
It was so much fun!
But then our memories…

You said it yourself, right?
If we don't have memories, we can make them together.

It really worked out that way.
Today, we made memories together,
And had a real adventure searching the island…
I had so much fun!
Kaori…

You know, I told you before,
I spent a lot of time alone when I lived here.
Ah… yeah.

When I lived on Hitogashima Island,
I often felt lonely.
But today was different.

Today, you, Shinpei,
And Mio stayed with me,
And I was really happy.

I felt happy exploring the island with you,
And discovered many charms of the island I hadn't noticed before…

With this feeling,
I think I can properly convey the charm of Hitogashima Island
At the talk show.
So… thank you!

Because of all of you,
Today became a really fun and memorable day!
Koyuba…
(It's not my imagination)

(Compared to when we first met,
Her smile is much brighter now)

I see…
That's good!

(If I think about it…
Going back and forth across the island
Might not have been a waste after all)

Well, everything went according to my calculations!
It was worth it to roam the entire island.

Don't say it so properly.
If I messed up, it might have just ended by dragging you around.

You're right.
If the live was canceled,
what were you planning to do?

Heh, that's the time, that's the time!
Hey, Kaori-chan?
Yeah! Really!
